_comment: Sample blind retrieval queries for the immune benchmark. These were written by an independent AI agent that had NEVER seen the immune memory data. Each query has an expected_category used for semantic match scoring (not specific pattern IDs). Copy this file to benchmark-queries.json and adapt to your own memory contents, or set IMMUNE_BENCH_QUERIES env var.
_categories_doc: Categories are scored via keyword overlap in run-blind.js:categoryMatch(). The expected_category MUST be one of the keys defined there. To add new categories, edit categoryMatch() in run-blind.js.
